rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §39.035 governs field testing of assessment instruments—unrelated subject matter with no operative connection.
quote: Sec. 39.035. LIMITATION ON FIELD TESTING OF ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text addresses field testing of state assessment instruments; it contains no provisions related to property tax exemptions, appraised value, or homestead policy.
